summary: Switched the build-verify flow's review phase from the single-reviewer 'review' to the parallel 'multi-review' phase, so a build-verify run dispatches one review per role in PARALLEL_REVIEW_ROLES (6 in total) and merges them via mergeReviewFindings. The existing run.mjs multi-review handler (already wired to runParallelReviews + mergeReviewFindings) is reused, so this is a minimal, focused change. Updated flows.test.mjs to assert the new phase composition and the 6-role parallel dispatch.
